faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Cook
faq.messageSentDesc: We'll get back to you soon.

questions.q1: How does AI recipe generation work?
questions.a1: Our AI analyzes the image of your fridge or pantry, identifies available ingredients, and generates personalized recipes based on the selected mode (Cleanup, Beast, or Slim).
questions.a2: Cleanup mode prioritizes the use of ingredients you already have available, helping to avoid waste and creatively empty your fridge.
questions.a3: Beast Mode is ideal for those looking to build muscle mass, generating recipes high in protein and calories to support your bulking goals.
questions.q4: How does Slim Down mode help me?
questions.a4: Slim Down mode focuses on low-calorie recipes with high nutritional value, perfect for those in a cutting phase or wanting to lose weight healthily.
questions.q5: Can I save my favorite recipes?
questions.a5: Yes! All generated recipes can be saved to your profile. You can also mark recipes as favorites and rate them to find them easily later.
questions.a6: Yes, each recipe comes with complete information on calories, protein, carbohydrates, and fats to help with your nutritional tracking.
questions.q7: Can I set personalized nutritional goals?
questions.a7: Yes! In your profile, you can configure your daily calorie and macronutrient goals. The dashboard shows your progress towards these goals.
questions.a8: You can install our app as a PWA and access your saved recipes offline. Generating new recipes requires an internet connection.

howItWorksPage.title: How the Magic Works
howItWorksPage.subtitle: Learn about the technology behind Cook and discover how we transform simple photos into amazing recipes.
howItWorksPage.featuresSubtitle: Cutting-edge technology combined with nutritional expertise.
howItWorksPage.feature1Desc: Our AI can identify over 500 different ingredients in your photos.
howItWorksPage.feature2Desc: Algorithms that automatically calculate macros and suggest ideal combinations.
howItWorksPage.feature3Desc: All recipes are validated by nutritionists and professional chefs.
howItWorksPage.feature4Desc: Recipes adapted to your objectives: weight loss, muscle gain, or maintenance.
howItWorksPage.feature5Desc: Your photos are processed and deleted immediately. Nothing is stored.
howItWorksPage.feature6Desc: Analysis and recipe generation in less than 10 seconds.
